legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block.
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires per-element/per-widget runtime canvas interaction, media upload, RTE formatting, undo/redo, or Preview/Reader/CLP/publish/persistence flows.

mappings.reason: Full enabled Elements + Widgets tray render (runtime). The no-interactive subset of this is approximated by the RULE suite (no blocked interactive widget data-types in tray).
Drag & drop each Element individually onto canvas
Drag & drop each Widget individually + config UI loads
Add the same Element multiple times (independent instances)
Add the same Widget multiple times (independent configs)
Drag element to invalid area does not add it
Header element text entry + bold/italic/underline formatting
Title element text entry + large font
Text element bullets / numbering / line breaks
Image upload + display on canvas (OS file picker)
Audio upload + playback in preview (OS file picker)
Video upload + playback in preview (OS file picker)
HTML Interactivity embedding renders in preview
Table creation + rows/columns + text formatting
Callout text + background colour styling
Situation Header title + subtitle layout
CLIC widget configure + save + works in Preview
Carousel add images + navigate slides
Sidebar expand / collapse toggle
Apply bold / italic / underline / font size (RTE render)
Bullet + numbering list creation
Enter key inserts a line break
Activity saves successfully (success confirmation)
Save with no changes (no-op / confirmation)
Activity opens correctly in Preview mode
Publish an activity (marked published)
Publish without changes after edit (re-publish same content)
Published activity launches + displays in Reader
Edit published activity + republish (Reader reflects update)
Performance with large text/images (editor responsive)
Reject unsupported file format (.exe) on Image upload
Duplicate elements/widgets behave independently
Delete an element from the canvas (per-element delete)
Undo / redo actions revert + reapply
